ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference

Petition For Order Directing Transferand Conveyance Of Trust Property; And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Directing Transferand Conveyance Of Trust Property; And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Continued To Aug-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Cassidy for and with William Reed (Respondent). John Boessenecker for John Murray (Successor Trustee).

Mr. Boessenecker stated that Lori Rock had received notice and that there was a receipt on file with her signature. Ms. Cassidy stated that the parties had agreed on mediation. Mr. Boessenecker concurred and requested that he be given time to do discovery. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 8, 2009. The matter is continued to August 31, 2009 for status on the mediation. The trial date is to be set.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.

Petition For Order Directing Transferand Conveyance Of Trust Property; And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Continued To Jun-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
